title: Docker: Container OOM Killed (Exit Code 137)
title_zh: Docker: 容器 OOM 被杀死 (退出码 137)

solutions.title: Increase memory limit
steps: docker run --memory=512m --memory-swap=1g <image>
docker-compose: set deploy.resources.limits.memory
Check memory usage: docker stats
Fix the app: reduce memory usage, add pagination, use streaming
steps_zh: docker run --memory=512m --memory-swap=1g <镜像>
docker-compose：设置 deploy.resources.limits.memory
检查 memory usage：docker stats
修复 app: reduce memory usage, add pagination, use streaming

solutions_zh.title: 增加内存限制
steps: docker run --memory=512m --memory-swap=1g <image>
docker-compose: 设置 deploy.resources.limits.memory
查看内存使用: docker stats
修复应用: 减少内存使用、添加分页、使用流式处理

code_fix:
# docker-compose.yml
services:
  app:
    image: myapp
    deploy:
      resources:
        limits:
          memory: 512M

title: Docker: Port Already Allocated / Bind Error

solutions.title: Free the port or use different port
steps: Error: bind: address already in use → port is occupied
Check what's using the port: lsof -i :8080 or netstat -ano | findstr 8080
Change the host port: docker run -p 8081:8080 <image>
Kill the existing container: docker stop <container> && docker rm <container>
solutions.title_zh: 释放端口或使用其他端口
steps_zh: 错误：bind: address already in use → 端口被占用
检查 what's using the port：lsof -i :8080 or netstat -ano | findstr 8080
更改 the host port：docker run -p 8081:8080 <image>
终止 the existing container：docker stop <container> && docker rm <container>

solutions_zh.title: 释放端口或使用不同端口
steps: 端口被占用
查看端口占用: lsof -i :8080 或 netstat -ano | findstr 8080
更换主机端口: docker run -p 8081:8080 <image>
停止已有容器: docker stop <container> && docker rm <container>

code_fix:
# Check who's using port 8080
lsof -i :8080
# Change port mapping
docker run -p 8081:8080 myapp

title: Docker: Exec Format Error / Wrong Architecture
title_zh: Docker: 执行格式错误 / 架构不匹配

solutions.title: Fix architecture or entrypoint
steps: The image was built for a different CPU architecture (e.g. ARM on x86)
Use --platform: docker build --platform linux/amd64 .
Check entrypoint: ensure it starts with #!/bin/sh or is a valid binary
Use multi-arch builds: docker buildx build --platform linux/amd64,linux/arm64
steps_zh: 镜像是为不同 CPU 架构构建的（如 ARM for x86）
使用 --platform：docker build --platform linux/amd64 .
检查 entrypoint：ensure it starts with #!/bin/sh or is a valid binary
使用 multi-arch builds：docker buildx build --platform linux/amd64,linux/arm64

solutions_zh.title: 修正架构或入口点
steps: 镜像为不同的 CPU 架构构建（如 ARM 在 x86 上运行）
使用 --platform: docker build --platform linux/amd64 .
检查 entrypoint: 确保以 #!/bin/sh 开头或为有效二进制文件
使用多架构构建: docker buildx build --platform linux/amd64,linux/arm64

code_fix:
# Build for specific platform
docker build --platform linux/amd64 -t myapp .
# Multi-architecture build
docker buildx build --platform linux/amd64,linux/arm64 -t myapp .

title: Docker: No Space Left on Device

solutions.title: Clean Docker disk usage
steps: Docker has accumulated too much build cache, images, and volumes
docker system prune -a (removes all unused images, containers, networks)
docker builder prune (removes build cache)
docker volume prune (removes unused volumes)
Check: docker system df to see space usage
solutions.title_zh: 清理 Docker 磁盘占用
steps_zh: Docker 积累了过多的构建缓存、镜像和卷
docker system prune -a（删除所有未使用的镜像、容器、网络）
docker builder prune（删除构建缓存）
docker volume prune（删除未使用的卷）
检查：docker system df 查看空间使用情况

solutions_zh.title: 清理 Docker 磁盘使用
steps: Docker 积累了太多构建缓存、镜像和卷
docker system prune -a (删除所有未使用的镜像、容器、网络)
docker builder prune (删除构建缓存)
docker volume prune (删除未使用的卷)
检查: docker system df 查看空间使用

code_fix:
# Check disk usage
docker system df
# Clean everything unused
docker system prune -a --volumes

title: Docker: Container Keeps Restarting

solutions.title: Check container logs and config
steps: The container starts, crashes, and restarts in a loop
Check logs: docker logs --tail 50 <container>
Common cause: app crashes on startup, missing env vars, or DB not ready
Fix: check docker-compose depends_on with healthcheck, or add restart delay
steps_zh: 容器启动、崩溃、重启循环
检查 logs：docker logs --tail 50 <container>
常见 cause：app crashes on startup, missing env vars, or DB not ready
修复：check docker-compose depends_on with healthcheck, or add restart delay

solutions_zh.title: 查看容器日志和配置
steps: 容器启动、崩溃、再重启，不断循环
查看日志: docker logs --tail 50 <container>
常见原因: 应用启动时崩溃、缺少环境变量或数据库未就绪
修正: docker-compose depends_on 加 healthcheck，或添加重启延迟

code_fix:
# Check what's happening
docker logs myapp --tail 100
# docker-compose with health check
# depends_on:
#   db:
#     condition: service_healthy

title: Docker: Build Failed / COPY not found
title_zh: Docker: 构建失败 / COPY 未找到文件

solutions.title: Fix COPY path or .dockerignore
steps: COPY failed: the source file doesn't exist relative to the build context (.)
Check .dockerignore — the file might be excluded
Paths are relative to the Dockerfile directory, not your current directory
Use absolute paths from the build context: COPY ./src/app.js /app/
steps_zh: COPY 失败：源文件相对于构建上下文（.）不存在
检查 .dockerignore — the file might be excluded
路径相对于 Dockerfile 所在目录，而非当前工作目录
使用 absolute paths from the build context：COPY ./src/app.js /app/

solutions_zh.title: 修正 COPY 路径或 .dockerignore
steps: COPY 失败: 源文件相对于构建上下文 (.) 不存在
检查 .dockerignore——文件可能被排除了
路径相对于 Dockerfile 所在目录，而非当前目录
使用构建上下文的绝对路径: COPY ./src/app.js /app/

code_fix:
# ❌ Wrong: file relative to wrong directory
COPY ../config.json /app/

# ✅ Correct
COPY ./config.json /app/

title: Docker: Network / DNS Resolution Failure
title_zh: Docker: 网络 / DNS 解析失败

solutions.title: Fix Docker networking
steps: Containers can't resolve each other's hostnames
In docker-compose: services can reach each other by service name
Without compose: create a user-defined network (docker network create mynet)
DNS issues: check /etc/resolv.conf in the container, or set --dns flag
steps_zh: 容器无法解析彼此的主机名
在 docker-compose 中：服务之间可通过服务名互通
没有 compose：创建用户定义网络（docker network create mynet）
DNS 问题：检查容器的 /etc/resolv.conf，或设置 --dns 标志

solutions_zh.title: 修复 Docker 网络
steps: 容器间无法解析彼此的主机名
在 docker-compose 中: 服务可以通过 service name 互相访问
非 compose: 创建自定义网络 (docker network create mynet)
DNS 问题: 检查容器内 /etc/resolv.conf，或设置 --dns 标志

code_fix:
# Create a custom network
docker network create mynet
docker run --network mynet -d --name db postgres
docker run --network mynet -d --name app myapp  # Can connect to 'db' by hostname

title: Docker: Volume Permission Denied

solutions.title: Fix volume permissions
steps: The container user doesn't have permission to read/write the mounted volume
Check the UID/GID mismatch: the container runs as a different user than the host
docker run -u $(id -u):$(id -g) ... to match host user
Or chmod 777 /path (less secure) or chown to match container userID
steps_zh: 容器用户没有读写挂载卷的权限
检查 the UID/GID mismatch：the container runs as a different user than the host
docker run -u $(id -u):$(id -g) ... 匹配宿主机用户
或 chmod 777 /path (less secure) or chown to match container userID

solutions_zh.title: 修正卷权限
steps: 容器用户无权读写挂载的卷
UID/GID 不匹配: 容器以不同于主机的用户运行
docker run -u $(id -u):$(id -g) ... 匹配主机用户
或 chmod 777 /path（较不安全）或 chown 匹配容器用户 ID

code_fix:
# Run container as current user
 docker run -u $(id -u):$(id -g) -v ./data:/data myapp
# Or set user in Dockerfile
# USER 1000:1000
